title: Fiery Yellow Pepper Flatbread
description: A flavorful vegan flatbread topped with a spicy yellow pepper sauce, perfect for a quick snack or meal.

ingredients.name: fiery pepper
ingredients.amount: 1-2 teaspoons, depending on desired heat level

instructions: Slice the yellow pepper into thin strips.
In a blender or food processor, blend the sliced yellow pepper, fiery pepper, and a pinch of salt until smooth.
Transfer the pepper sauce to a bowl and stir in the Greek yogurt (if using).
Arrange the flatbread pieces on a baking sheet.
Brush the pepper sauce evenly onto the flatbread pieces.
Bake in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the sauce is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
